q: How much time do you spend on your studies every day?
examiner_note:
Câu hỏi này về thói quen và quản lý thời gian. 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Bạn có thể nêu con số cụ thể, sau đó giải thích sự khác nhau giữa ngày thường và cuối tuần, hoặc giữa giai đoạn học bình thường và giai đoạn ôn thi. 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các trạng từ chỉ tần suất và mức độ như 'on average', 'roughly', 'depending on', 'intense period', 'crunch time' để câu trả lời sinh động hơn.

band7.text: On average, I spend about 4 to 5 hours a day studying. This includes attending lectures at university and doing my homework at home. However, during exam seasons, I definitely have to put in more effort and might study for up to 8 hours.
band7.note: Trả lời thực tế, có sự phân biệt giữa ngày thường và kỳ thi. Từ vựng ổn định ('average', 'effort').

band8.text: It typically varies depending on my academic workload. Usually, I dedicate around 6 hours a day to my studies. But during intense periods like final exams or when an assignment deadline is approaching, I'm often buried in my books from dawn till dusk.
band8.note: Sử dụng các cụm từ hay như 'dedicate around', 'intense periods', 'approaching', 'from dawn till dusk'.

band9.text: Roughly speaking, I devote approximately six to seven hours daily to academic pursuits. However, during 'crunch time' before major assessments, this figure can escalate significantly. I try to maintain a consistent schedule to avoid last-minute cramming, which I find quite counterproductive.
band9.note: Từ vựng học thuật đỉnh cao ('devote', 'academic pursuits', 'crunch time', 'escalate', 'counterproductive'). Cách diễn đạt rất tinh tế.

v.example: On average, I sleep about 7 hours a night.
There are roughly 500 students in our department.
The approximate cost of the trip is $200.
She devotes a lot of time to her charity work.
University life is not just about academic pursuits; it's also about personal growth.

v.meaning: thời gian quan trọng/áp lực nhất
v.example: It's crunch time, so we all need to work late to finish the project.
The conflict between the two countries escalated rapidly.
Studying all night is often counterproductive as it makes you too tired to think clearly.
I had to cram for my history exam the night before.
We made a last-minute decision to go to the beach.
The library has a room dedicated to local history.
The weeks leading up to finals are a very intense period for students.

v.meaning: từ sáng sớm đến tối mịt
v.example: He works from dawn till dusk to provide for his family.
The exams are approaching, so I need to start revising.
Engineering students often have a very heavy academic workload.
Effective time management is the key to balancing work and study.
I try to follow a consistent schedule to stay organized.
I had a very productive morning and finished three reports.
Distance learning requires a lot of self-discipline.
Noise from the street made concentration difficult.
I find that music can be a distraction when I'm trying to study.
Pulling an all-nighter is never a good idea before a big exam.
Stress at work can lead to physical and mental burnout.
I'm currently revising my notes for the upcoming test.
Students are required to take a mock exam before the actual one.
The school rewards students for their academic success.
You need to put in more effort if you want to improve your grades.
I need to focus on my studies if I want to pass my exams.
Lack of motivation is a common problem among university students.
Learning a new language requires a lot of perseverance.
Finishing your first year of university is a major milestone.
He has a strong commitment to his studies.
The medicine program is a high-pressure environment.
It's been a long and tiring day at school.
The scientific method requires rigorous testing and analysis.

v.meaning: được sắp xếp tốt/có tổ chức
v.example: Her notes are always very well-organized.
The school takes a proactive approach to student mental health.
It's important to find a balance between work and play.
I need at least two hours of uninterrupted study time each day.
I usually look for a quiet spot in the library to do my work.
An hour of focused study is better than three hours of distracted study.
Establishing a solid study routine took me several months.
I've reserved a time slot in the computer lab for this afternoon.
Athletes need to be in peak performance for the Olympics.

v.meaning: sự sáng suốt về tinh thần
v.example: Meditation can help improve concentration and mental clarity.
Taking a short nap can help you recharge and stay productive.
The new system has greatly improved the efficiency of the lab.
Active recall is a great technique for long-term knowledge retention.
The school is committed to the continuous improvement of its teaching quality.
I thoroughly enjoyed the course and learned a lot.
